texto: These scars that we have... they don't go away. They only fade with time, but they're still hauntingly there.

texto: What's going on?— Ingrid asked. "Listen, nothing bad today, please.— She pulled a chair out and sat down. Faye stared at her and said the words as quickly as she could. "I'm just going to give it to you straight as I can. Mila is a witch.— Ingrid busted out with a laugh. "I wouldn't call her that,— she said. "That's a little harsh, isn't it?— She poured the juice into her glass and took a drink. "What did the brat do this time?— She set her glass down.

frase_original: What’s going on?” Ingrid asked. “Listen, nothing bad today, please.” She pulled a chair out and sat down. Faye stared at her and said the words as quickly as she could. “I’m just going to give it to you straight as I can. Mila is a witch.” Ingrid busted out with a laugh. “I wouldn’t call her that,” she said. “That’s a little harsh, isn’t it?” She poured the juice into her glass and took a drink. “What did the brat do this time?” She set her glass down.
